Implemented the ARC2 package for `494ef9d7` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_494ef9d7/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_494ef9d7/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_494ef9d7/generator.py#L1). The rule is: scan rows independently, and if a row has exactly two nonzero cells whose colors are `{4,7}` or `{1,8}`, move the right cell left so it becomes immediately adjacent to the left cell. I used the summary hints because both matched the official examples; no correction note or new primitive was needed.
